_publications._publicationTitle: Effect of simvastatin on cognitive functioning in children with neurofibromatosis type 1: a randomized controlled trial.

_contextSnippet: We also did not observe an effect on the secondary outcome measures...judgment of line orientation...In the placebo group, the improvement between baseline and 12 weeks was significant on 4 of 9 neuropsychological outcome measures...judgment of line orientation...leading to a performance within the normal range
details: No significant effect between groups, but showed significant improvement from baseline to 12 weeks in placebo group, reaching normal range performance
